description: Market Cycle Extremes Radar - scores top-risk (euphoria signs: stretched valuations, narrowing breadth, euphoric sentiment, complacent vol/credit, insider distribution) and reads the Capitulation engine for the washout side. data/market-extremes.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Market Cycle Extremes Radar - daily 23:00 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, after the valuation, breadth, sentiment and capitulation feeds have refreshed.
